ground_truth.title: The big list of streaming deals
ground_truth.author: Jared Newman
ground_truth.main_content: Back in the old days of cable, keeping your TV bill in check required routine calls to customer service, followed by desperate pleas for a lower rate and/or threats to cancel your service. With streaming TV, things work a bit differently. While you can't call up Netflix or HBO to ask for a lower price, you can often snag discounts on streaming services if you know where to look. In this guide, I've done the legwork of finding all the best streaming deals, so you can save money on Paramount+, Peacock Premium, Netflix, the Disney bundle, and more. Streaming service deals up to date as of December 19, 2025. Select returning Paramount+ subscribers can get two months for Premium for $1 per month with promo code RM2KN3. Apple TV+ offers a month free through a redemption link. ESPN Unlimited bundles with Disney+ and Hulu free for the first year, ending January 5. YouTube TV is available for $63 per month for five months for new subscribers. Philo offers first month for $25 for new subscribers. Starz offers one year for $12 or three months for $3 per month for new and returning subscribers. Hallmark+ is $40 for one year with promo code SAVE50NOW. AMC+ offers 30 days free with promo code AMC30FT4. MHz Choice has 40% off for one year with code HOLIDAY25. Spectrum TV Select is $100 per month for a year, including the Disney bundle, HBO Max, Paramount+, Peacock, AMC+, and Vix all with ads. Streaming device deals include Walmart Onn 4K Pro for $45, Roku devices from $16-$75, Fire TV Stick HD for $18 with code HOL25HD, and Google TV Streamer for $75. Streaming service bundles include Peacock and Apple TV for $15 per month, Disney+ and Hulu for $13 per month with ads, and Disney+, Hulu, and Max bundle for $20 per month with ads. Credit cards with streaming discounts include Disney with American Express offering $7-$10 per month statement credit, and Peacock with MasterCard offering $3-$5 monthly credit. Free streaming services with other subscriptions include HBO Max with DoorDash DashPass, Paramount+ or Peacock with Walmart+, Peacock with Instacart+, and Disney service with Kroger Boost. Verizon offers Netflix and Max bundle for $10 per month, Disney bundle for $10 per month, and Apple One for $15 per month. T-Mobile includes Netflix with select plans, Hulu with certain plans, and Apple TV with various plans. AT&T does not offer streaming deals but includes HBO Max with legacy plans. Other wireless carriers offer HBO Max with Cricket, Amazon Prime with Metro, Disney+ with Total by Verizon, and more.
with: Back in the old days of cable, keeping your TV bill in check required routine calls to customer service, followed by desperate pleas for a lower rate and/or threats to cancel your service.
With streaming TV, things work a bit differently. While you can't call up Netflix or HBO to ask for a lower price, you can often snag discounts on streaming services if you know where to look.
In this guide, I've done the legwork of finding all the best streaming deals, so you can save money on Paramount+, Peacock Premium, Netflix, the Disney bundle, and more.
These deals are up to date as of December 19, 2025, and I'll do my best to refresh this information over time.
Select returning subscribers can get two months for Premium for $1 per month with promo code RM2KN3.
